summary: Missing line item exception. PO-2025-4004 included four line items; invoice NE-2025-INV-00184 bills only three. Item NE-PCB-88 (Printed Circuit Board, 5 units x JPY 4,200 = JPY 21,000) is absent from the invoice. Two possible scenarios: (1) item not yet shipped and will appear on a subsequent invoice, or (2) item was shipped but omitted from billing in error. Invoiced amount JPY 129,580 covers the three billed lines accurately. Recommend approving billed lines and issuing a hold notice to vendor requesting shipment/billing status for NE-PCB-88.

exceptions.description: NE-PCB-88 (Printed Circuit Board 5 units x JPY 4,200 = JPY 21,000) present in PO-2025-4004 but absent from invoice NE-2025-INV-00184
exceptions.resolution: Contact vendor for shipment/billing status. Approve billed amount JPY 129,580.

agent_insights: 3 of 4 PO lines billed accurately — approve JPY 129,580
NE-PCB-88 missing — vendor notification generated for shipment status
GRN-4004-A shows partial receipt — PCB line not confirmed received
No fraud signals — established vendor, consistent banking details
